textByHashes.8e0b7968f7e28be117a65715f4a45f85d682c525: What do I need to do?
textByHashes.1d90922339d16224888adfc39db3925466bd73f7: Uh... Isn't Drezel that dude upstairs? Oh, wait, Roald's the king of Misthalin right?
textByHashes.acc24991b90ea3d1fdee154aec709d95d2594ce3: I dunno. I guess it might be. Does it matter?
textByHashes.a80ab1316bfd416b7b8da9b9d7e7763389ad8f30: I dunno... I don't think so...
textByHashes.87c88cfca12e7f5ea5778bafb3d694d0d98e8b09: Yeah, maybe you should go tell the king what a great job you did buddy!
